prompt: Run feature-documenter with no arguments. Index has 3 features: order-cancellation (phase=resolved), user-registration (phase=traced), payment-processing (phase=discovered).

assertions.text: Output lists all 3 features with their current phases
Next action for order-cancellation is generate, user-registration is resolve, payment-processing is trace
When order-cancellation's next action is generate, output recommends a fresh session
Output asks the user which feature to work on

prompt: Run feature-documenter with --search 'order'. Index has: order-cancellation (resolved), order-fulfillment (traced), user-registration (discovered).

assertions.text: Search matches both order-cancellation and order-fulfillment
user-registration is not included in results
Each matched feature shows its current phase
Each matched feature shows what command to run next

prompt: Run feature-documenter with --search 'billing'. Index has: order-cancellation, user-registration. No billing features exist.

assertions.text: Output states no existing features match 'billing'
Output suggests running /feature-documenter:discover --search billing

prompt: Run feature-documenter with --fresh flag. .feature-docs/ directory exists with state files.

assertions.text: Skill asks for confirmation before deleting .feature-docs/
Skill does not delete .feature-docs/ without user confirmation
After deletion, skill tells user to run /feature-documenter:init

prompt: Run feature-documenter with no arguments. .feature-docs/_settings.md does not exist.

assertions.text: Skill detects that _settings.md is missing
Skill tells user to run /feature-documenter:init
Skill does not attempt to show a dashboard or scan repos

prompt: Run feature-documenter with --auto and feature name 'user-registration'. Feature is at phase=discovered.

assertions.text: Skill automatically invokes the trace skill for user-registration without asking
Skill does not ask 'would you like to trace this feature?' -- it just does it

prompt: Run feature-documenter with --auto and feature name 'order-cancellation'. Feature is at phase=resolved.

assertions.text: Skill does NOT automatically invoke generate even though --auto is set
Skill explains that auto mode pauses before generation
Skill recommends starting a fresh session for generate
